goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'monday' and should 'leave after 16:15'.
The train should go to 'ely' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'arrival time' and 'train ID'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the type of 'guesthouse' and should have 'a star of 4'.
The hotel should 'include free parking'.
Make sure you get 'area', 'postcode', and 'whether they have internet'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should leave on monday and should leave after 16:15
The train should go to ely and should depart from cambridge
Make sure you get arrival time and train ID
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the type of guesthouse and should have a star of 4
The hotel should include free parking
Make sure you get area, postcode, and whether they have internet
